chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَسْتَأْجِرُ الْأَرْضَ أَوِ الدَّارَ فَيُؤَاجِرُهَا بِأَكْثَرَ مِمَّا اسْتَأْجَرَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 131 – The man leases the land or the house, so he sub-leases it out with more than what he had leased it for

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/357)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/357)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي لَأَكْرَهُ أَنْ أَسْتَأْجِرَ رَحًى وَحْدَهَا ثُمَّ أُؤَاجِرَهَا بِأَكْثَرَ مِمَّا اسْتَأْجَرْتُهَا بِهِ إِلَّا أَنْ يُحْدَثَ فِيهَا حَدَثٌ أَوْ تُغْرَمَ فِيهَا غَرَامَةٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> dislike that I<sup>asws</sup> rent one grinding stone, then I<sup>asws</sup> hire it out for more than what I had hired it for unless I<sup>asws</sup> introduce something new in it, or make a loss in it’.
en.sarwar: 9. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘ah from abu Basir who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘I dislike renting a grinding stone, then renting it out to someone else for more than what I has rented for, unless some improvement is made or loss has taken place.’”
